address: 28 St Marks Pl, New York, NY 10003, USA
dish_name: Beverages (6 varieties: Water, Soda, Sour Plum Drink, Coconut Milk, Vita Lemon Tea, Herbal Tea)
description: Water / 矿泉水 ($2.00); Soda / 碳酸饮料 ($2.00); Sour Plum Drink / 酸梅汤 ($3.00); Coconut Milk / 椰奶 ($3.00); Vita Lemon Tea / 维他柠檬茶 ($2.00); Herbal tea / 王老吉 ($2.00). No alcoholic beverages listed on this menu.

likely_allergens.reason: Coconut Milk is one of the six beverage varieties; coconut is treated as a tree nut under some regulatory allergen-labeling conventions even though botanically it is a drupe, and some tree-nut-allergic individuals react to it
